_comment: This is the manifest template. Fields ending in _comment are documentation only; remove them in actual manifests.
_paths_comment: Recorded at init so later sessions know where the source PDF and the output folder live. Both are absolute paths on the user's machine. source_pdf is read on demand for page-range extraction; output_dir is where the study guide is written. source_md is the full-book markdown produced by opendataloader-pdf at init time (null if Java was unavailable or source is not a PDF).
generated_at_comment: ISO 8601 timestamp when the manifest was first created

chapters.title: Chapter title from the book's table of contents
chapters._page_range_comment: 1-based inclusive PDF page numbers for this chapter, read from the ToC at init. Used to extract just this chapter off disk (pdftotext -f page_start -l page_end). These are PDF page numbers, which may differ from the printed page numbers if the PDF has front matter.
chapters._subsections_comment: Filled in when chapter is generated. Each entry: {id, title}
